texto: Your husband may not be a wealth of pregnancy information, but he is a wealth of 'you' information. He probably knows you better than anyone else in this world (which means he understands your current neediness pretty well). He also probably loves you more than anyone else in this world. So, while he may not be the person to turn to if you need to know how to soothe breast tenderness, he's the perfect person to turn to when you need a hand to hold.
explicacao: Citação de Erin MacPherson sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Your husband may not be a wealth of pregnancy information, but he is a wealth of 'you' informatio…” articula motivacao, humor, inspiration em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como casamento e inspiracao.
